text: I'm a rabid Kaiju fan, ever since I was a kid watching those iconic Godzilla flix in the 60s and 70s, ALWAYS rooting for the big fella, the lizard king. I'm also a six yr US Army vet, 25th Infantry. Joined because of their record in Nam, although the war had ended 4 years prior. Well, and because of certain wonderful things cultivated on Maui, our home;-) During the chopper insertion, when that dickwipe dropped charges on a herd of deer, I'm thinking, hah, here we go. Sure enough, the Kongster showed up and made it personal. That was legendary.
